sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: very practical everyday fruit because cheap, portable, and easy to use, which matters for a fruit people actually eat often. often easy to tolerate because a practical plus for many people compared with harsher foods. brings a useful potassium identity because not enough to make it elite, but still a real supportive strength.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: sugar load is fairly high because less moderated than the best fruits. fibre is only modest because decent, but not category-leading. glycemic behaviour is only middling because not harsh, just not one of the cleanest fruits on this axis.
